children.label: a
children.text: To the extent they are not inconsistent with the provisions of this subchapter, the following provisions of subchapter I of this chapter shall be applicable to this subchapter; subsections (b), (c), (d), (e), and (h) of and subsections (c), (d), (e), and (f) of . Any reference in such provisions to “this subchapter” shall be deemed to be a reference to those provisions and to this subchapter.section 1623 of this titlesection 1626 of this title

children.label: b
children.text: Except as otherwise provided in this subchapter and in those provisions of subchapter I referred to in subsection (a), the Commission shall comply with the provisions of subchapter II of chapter 5, and the provisions of chapter 7, of title 5.
